nasb.text: And they were bringing children to Him so that He might touch them; but the disciples rebuked them.

esv.text: And they were bringing children to him that he might touch them, and the disciples rebuked them.

cnv.text: 有人帶著小孩子到耶穌跟前，要他觸摸他們；門徒卻責備那些人。

ccb.text: 有人带着小孩子来要让耶稣摸一摸，门徒却责备他们。

csbs.text: 有些人把小孩子带到耶稣那里，好让耶稣摸他们一下。门徒们却责备那些人。
